vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

base_predicate_sqls: ((("list_comments" IS NOT NULL AND "list_comments" > 0 AND "list_comments" <= 0) OR ("list_comments" IS NOT NULL AND "list_comments" > 0 AND "list_comments" <= 0)) OR ("list_comments" > 0 OR "list_comments" IS NULL))
fragment_roles: rows where 0 < list_comments <= 0 + rows where 0 < list_comments <= 0 + rows where list_comments > 0 or is NULL
lists||vfrag=list_comments.fragment_role_B: rows where 0 < list_comments <= 0 + rows where 0 < list_comments <= 0 + rows where list_comments > 0 or is NULL

base_predicate_sqls: ((("user_subscriber" IS NOT NULL AND "user_subscriber" > 0 AND "user_subscriber" <= 0) OR ("user_subscriber" IS NOT NULL AND "user_subscriber" > 0 AND "user_subscriber" <= 1)) OR ("user_subscriber" > 1 OR "user_subscriber" IS NULL))
fragment_roles: rows where 0 < user_subscriber <= 0 + rows where 0 < user_subscriber <= 1 + rows where user_subscriber > 1 or is NULL
lists_users||vfrag=user_2.fragment_role_B: rows where 0 < user_subscriber <= 0 + rows where 0 < user_subscriber <= 1 + rows where user_subscriber > 1 or is NULL

fragment_roles: rows where movie_release_year > 2014 or is NULL

justification.cross_local_query_count_interpretation: Distinct cross-local workload queries where this fragment pair (different original tables) co-occurs; not an estimate of single-local queries after relocation.
Distinct cross-local workload queries where this fragment pair (different original tables) co-occurs; not an estimate of single-local queries after relocation.

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
